productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women's Adi Zing Red Flip Flop
description: Spice up your lazy days with these ADI Zing slippers from adidas. Available in funky colours, your expeditions become all the more comfortable with its cushioned footbed. Pair it with slim jeans and any bright top for a stylish casual look.UpperSynthetic leather straps with a velvety feel for durability and protection from blisteringSoftly cushioned straps for extra comfort and to avoid abrasionToe separator for easy wear and to hold the foot in placeMidsoleFoam footbed with graphics and brand mark for cushioned all-day comfort and styleOutsoleTPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for durability and tractionshoe careWipe off dirt with a moist clothDo not machine wash
